Meta.title: WinnerRadar — COD Winning Products for Algeria
Meta.description: Track high-velocity winning products backed by active Meta ads across Algerian Shopify, YouCan and Storeino stores — before they saturate.

Landing.badge: Live winner radar for the Algerian COD market
Landing.title: Find winning products before the market does.
Landing.subtitle: WinnerRadar cross-references real-time inventory depletion with verified active Meta ad campaigns to surface confirmed winners — not guesses.
Landing.feature1Desc: We snapshot stock across Shopify, YouCan and Storeino and compute true daily sales velocity from depletion.
Landing.feature2Desc: Every winner is cross-checked against the official Meta Ad Library for currently active creatives and copy.
Landing.feature3Desc: AI-scored store leads with ready-to-send call and email hooks for freelancers and agencies.
Landing.winnerCriteria: Confirmed Winner = rapid stock depletion + active Meta ads
